name: Classic Oversized Trench
description: Cut from premium water-resistant cotton twill. Designed with an intentional drape, dropped shoulders, and traditional storm flaps.

name: Heavyweight Pima Tee
description: Knit from 100% long-staple organic Pima cotton. Features a dense 280GSM weight that retains its structural silhouette.

name: Tailored Wool Trouser
description: Crafted from responsibly sourced Italian merino wool. Relaxed through the thigh with a sharp pressed crease.
